// fixture_clean.go.txt: synthetic source that uses the i18n localizer
// pattern. No literal user-facing English strings — every user message
// is sourced from the bundle by message ID.
package fixture

type Localizer interface {
	Localize(messageID string) (string, error)
}

func ask(l Localizer) (string, error) {
	return l.Localize("clarify.which_file")
}

func render(l Localizer) (string, error) {
	return l.Localize("ui.press_enter_to_continue")
}

// Short identifier-like strings (under threshold) are not flagged.
const apiVersion = "v1"
const endpoint = "/api/v1/users"
